race.comment: ANDRES GIRL (6) has made a bright start to her career by following up her debut second with a comfortable win at Wagga just over 5 weeks ago. She skips a grade to carry 1.5kg less this time, and she is set to repeat the dose. TRIPTOLEMUS (3) is a very progressive gelding who has won in all types of track conditions already in his short 5-start career, including 2 wins. He resumes from a spell with the blinkers on for the first time, and he has to be respected, despite having no lead-up public trials. Use the market as the best guide. SEASMOKE (8) was put aside after a modest last start effort in a far stronger race than this at Wagga at the start of May. She cops a wide gate but her talent will take her a long way in this. . Include MADE EASY (1) and ROCKET RUDEE (2) in all combos.
